zh: 你在干什么？！
en: What do you think you're doing?!

zh: 你偷拍我？
en: Did you just take a picture of me without asking?

zh: 抱歉，我不是故意的。只是觉得这个画面很有故事感，作为设计生一时没忍住。
en: Sorry, I didn't mean to intrude. I just thought the scene had a story to tell. As a design student, I couldn't help myself.

zh: 你要看照片的话，我现在就给你看，不满意我立刻删掉。
en: If you want to see the photo, I'll show you right now. If you don't like it, I'll delete it on the spot.

zh: 少废话，拿过来。
en: Less talking. Hand it over.

zh: ……这张照片，是你拍的？
en: …This photo… you took this?

zh: 嗯。我是设计专业，摄影是必修课程。
en: Mm-hmm. I'm a design major. Photography is a required course.

zh: 你叫什么名字？哪个学校的？
en: What's your name? Which school are you from?

zh: 林辰，山城大学的。
en: Lin Chen. Mountain City University.

zh: 山城大学设计系……大二？
en: Mountain City University, Design Department… sophomore?

zh: 你怎么知道？
en: How did you know?

zh: 我也是这所学校的，大一服装设计方向。
en: I go there too. Freshman, Fashion Design.

zh: 做我的品牌视觉设计师兼摄影师吧。
en: Be my brand's visual designer and photographer.

zh: 哈？
en: Huh?

zh: 你说什么？
en: Come again?

zh: 我有一个独立Lolita品牌「暗夜蔷薇」，缺专属摄影师和视觉设计。
en: I run an indie Lolita brand called "Dark Night Rose." I need a dedicated photographer and visual designer.

zh: 工资按项目结算，一张精修图50，一套海报300，拍摄一天800。比你去街头画头像或者做家教强多了。
en: Pay is per project — 50 per retouched photo, 300 per poster set, 800 per shoot day. Beats sketching portraits on the street or tutoring kids.

zh: 我们专业课业繁重，我恐怕没有太多空余时间。
en: My major's pretty demanding. I'm not sure I'll have much free time.

zh: 我看得出来，你是有真本事的人。之前找的三个摄影师，拍出来的东西要么像淘宝爆款，要么像影楼婚纱照。
en: I can tell you've got real skill. The three photographers I hired before — their work either looked like cheap Taobao listings or cheesy studio wedding portraits.

zh: 但你这张照片，抓住了我想要的那种「破碎感」和「倔强感」。
en: But this photo… it captures exactly what I want — that sense of being worn down but still defiant.

zh: 怎么，怕麻烦不敢接？也是，很多人看着有点天赋，真要落地做事就退缩了。
en: What, afraid of a little work? Yeah, I've seen it before — plenty of people have talent until it's time to actually deliver.

zh: 算了，我答应你。
en: Fine. I'll do it.

zh: 不过丑话说在前头，我只能利用课余时间，学业优先，还请你理解。
en: But let me be clear up front — I can only work in my spare time. School comes first. Hope you understand.

zh: 成交！这点我没问题。表现好的话，还有奖金。
en: Deal! That works for me. Do a good job and there'll be a bonus.

zh: 加个好友吧，我晚上把品牌资料、设计稿发给你，明天下午我们约个时间在老城区的老茶馆讨论一下具体的工作内容。
en: Let's add each other. I'll send you the brand materials and design drafts tonight. Tomorrow afternoon, we'll meet at an old teahouse in the old town to go over the details.

zh: 明天见，林辰。别迟到，我最讨厌等人了。
en: See you tomorrow, Lin Chen. Don't be late. I hate waiting for people.

zh: 我说……
en: Hey…

zh: 你夏天穿这么厚不热吗？
en: Aren't you dying of heat wearing all that in summer?

zh: 要你管啊，我体寒。
en: Mind your own business. I have poor circulation.

zh: 你走快点行不行？磨磨蹭蹭的。前面那个巷子看起来不错，我们去看看。
en: Can you walk any slower? Hurry up. That alley up ahead looks promising — let's check it out.

zh: 来了来了。
en: Coming, coming.

zh: 嗯……这里的墙壁太新了，没有那种年代感。而且光线太散了，拍出来会显得脸很平。
en: Mm-hmm… the wall here is too new. No sense of age. And the light's too diffused — it'll flatten out facial features in the shot.

zh: 那边那个门怎么样？就是那个绿色的木门，上面有铜环的那个。
en: What about that door over there? The green wooden one with the brass knocker.

zh: 不行，门的颜色和你这条裙子的颜色太接近了，会融在一起。而且上面的电线太多了，背景太乱。
en: No. The door color is too close to your dress — you'd blend right in. Plus there are too many wires above it. The background's a mess.

zh: 嗯，有道理。那我们再往前走走。
en: Mm, fair point. Let's keep walking then.

zh: 哇！这里太棒了！
en: Wow! This place is perfect!

zh: 你看这个光影！太完美了！还有这个铁门的质感，和我的新款裙子简直是绝配！
en: Look at the light and shadow here! It's perfect! And the texture of this iron door — it matches my new dress perfectly!

zh: 林辰，你快过来看看！站在这里拍怎么样？还有这里！
en: Lin Chen, come look! What about shooting from here? Oh, and here too!

zh: 嗯，这里确实不错。不过最好是下午三点左右来拍，那时候的光线最柔和，阴影也最好看。
en: Yeah, this spot is really good. Though we'd be better off coming around 3 PM — the light is softest then, and the shadows fall just right.

zh: 好！那我们就定在后天下午三点在这里拍摄！
en: Great! Then it's settled — day after tomorrow, 3 PM, right here!

zh: 太好了！终于找到合适的地方了！我之前找了好几个地方，从文创园到江边步道，都不满意。
en: Yes! I finally found the right spot! I checked so many places before — creative parks, riverside walkways — nothing worked.

zh: 好看。
en: Beautiful.

zh: 非常好看。
en: Absolutely stunning.

zh: 哼，算你有眼光。
en: Hmph. Guess you have good taste after all.

zh: 啊？怎么突然下雨了？
en: Ah? Where did this rain come from?

zh: 糟了！我没带伞！
en: Crap! I didn't bring an umbrella!

zh: 我带了。不过只有一把。
en: I did. But only one.

zh: 那……那我们一起撑吧。
en: Then… I guess we'll share.

zh: 呼……差点就被淋湿了。这雨怎么说下就下啊。
en: Whew… that was close. How does it just start pouring out of nowhere like that?

zh: 山城的夏天就是这样，天气预报根本不准。看样子一时半会儿停不了。
en: Mountain City summers — the forecast is never right. Doesn't look like it'll let up anytime soon.

zh: 两位，进来躲躲雨嘛。外面雨大得很，进来吃碗冰粉凉快凉快。
en: You two, come inside and get out of the rain. It's comin' down hard out there — have a bowl of ice jelly to cool off.

zh: 那……我们进去坐一会儿吧。
en: Well… let's go in and sit for a bit.

zh: 两位想吃点啥子？我们这里有红糖冰粉、糍粑冰粉、玫瑰冰粉，还有凉虾凉糕。
en: What'll it be, you two? We got brown-sugar ice jelly, sticky-rice-cake ice jelly, rose ice jelly, and cold rice shrimp jelly too.

zh: 我要一碗红糖冰粉，多加点山楂碎和花生碎。
en: I'll have a bowl of brown-sugar ice jelly. Extra hawthorn crumble and peanuts, please.

zh: 我也要一碗红糖冰粉。
en: Same for me.

zh: 要得，稍等哈。
en: Comin' right up.

zh: （望着窗外的雨）不知道这雨什么时候才能停。
en: （gazing out at the rain）Wonder when this rain will let up.

zh: 应该还要下一会儿。正好，我们可以趁这个时间讨论一下拍摄的细节。
en: Probably a while longer. Perfect time to go over the shoot details.

zh: 对了，我把新款裙子的样衣带来了，你看看。
en: Oh, I brought a sample of the new dress. Take a look.

zh: 哇……好漂亮。
en: Wow… it's gorgeous.

zh: 这是我这个季度的主打款，名字叫「星夜」。我花了三个月才设计好，光是刺绣就改了五次。
en: This is my flagship piece for the season. I call it "Starry Night." It took me three months to design, and I reworked the embroidery five times.

zh: 我跑了十几家工厂，从山城跑到隔壁省城，才找到一家愿意做这种复杂刺绣的。很多工厂都嫌麻烦，不愿意接小单子。
en: I went to over a dozen factories — from Mountain City all the way to the neighboring province — before I found one willing to do this kind of intricate embroidery. Most shops said it was too much trouble for such a small order.

zh: 你为什么要自己做品牌啊？以你的能力，毕业之后去大公司做设计师应该很容易吧。
en: Why start your own brand, though? With your talent, you could easily land a design job at a big company after graduation.

zh: 因为我想做自己真正喜欢的东西。
en: Because I want to make things I actually believe in.

zh: 大公司的设计师，都要按照市场的需求来设计。什么好卖就设计什么，根本没有自己的想法。我不想那样。我想设计出能真正表达我自己的衣服。
en: Designers at big companies just follow market trends. Design whatever sells. No room for your own vision. I don't want that. I want to create clothes that truly express who I am.

zh: 虽然现在很难，品牌也没什么名气，赚的钱也只够勉强维持。但我相信，只要我坚持下去，总会有人喜欢我的设计的。
en: It's hard right now — the brand has no reputation, and I barely make enough to keep it going. But I believe if I keep at it, people will come to love my designs.

zh: 我一定要让「暗夜蔷薇」成为全国最有名的Lolita品牌！
en: I'm going to make "Dark Night Rose" the most famous Lolita brand in the whole country!

zh: 我相信你一定可以的。
en: I know you will.

zh: 哼……那是当然。也不看看我是谁。
en: Hmph... obviously. Do you even know who you're talking to?

zh: 两位的冰粉来了！
en: Here are your iced jelly bowls!

zh: 谢谢老板娘。
en: Thanks, ma'am.

zh: 哇，好好吃！比我之前在市中心吃的那家还要好吃。
en: Wow, this is amazing! Way better than the place I tried downtown.

zh: 嗯，确实不错。
en: Mm, it's really good.

zh: 雨停了。
en: The rain stopped.

zh: 真的哎！太好了，终于可以回去了。
en: Oh, it did! Yes! We can finally head back.

zh: 老板娘，结账。
en: Ma'am, check please.

zh: 一共十六块。
en: That'll be sixteen yuan.

zh: 我来吧。就当是我请你的，谢谢你给我这个工作机会。
en: Let me get this. Call it a thank-you for giving me the gig.

zh: 哼……那好吧。下次我请你吃火锅。
en: Hmph... fine. Next time, hotpot's on me.

zh: 对了，林辰。后天拍摄的时候，你记得带反光板和补光灯。还有，你最好穿黑色的衣服，这样不会在裙子上反光。
en: Oh, and Lin Chen. For the shoot the day after tomorrow, bring a reflector and a fill light. And wear black — I don't want any color cast bouncing onto the dress.

zh: 知道了。你放心，我专业的。
en: Got it. Trust me, I'm a pro.

zh: 哼，最好是这样。要是拍不好，我可是会扣你工资的。
en: Hmph, you'd better be. Mess this up and I'm docking your pay.

zh: 我到了。我住女生宿舍，你就不用送进去了。
en: I'm here. Girls' dorm, so you can stop right there.

zh: 好。那后天下午三点，废弃工厂门口见。
en: Alright. See you at the abandoned factory gate, three PM day after tomorrow.

zh: 嗯。记得别迟到。还有，别忘了带反光板和补光灯。
en: Mm. Don't be late. And don't forget the reflector and fill light.

zh: 知道了，忘不了。
en: Got it, I won't forget.

zh: 那我进去了。拜拜。
en: I'm going in now. Bye.

zh: 哦，对了！林辰。
en: Oh, hey! Lin Chen.

zh: 嗯？怎么了？
en: Hm? What's up?

zh: 今天……谢谢你。陪我找了一下午的拍摄地，还请我吃了冰粉。
en: Today... thanks. For spending the whole afternoon scouting locations with me, and for the iced jelly.

zh: 还有……你拍的照片，真的很好看。
en: And... the photo you took. It's really beautiful.

zh: 你来得挺早的嘛。我还以为你会迟到呢。
en: You're early. I thought you'd be late.

zh: 我从来不迟到。东西都带来了，你看看还缺什么。
en: I'm never late. Brought everything — take a look and see if anything's missing.

zh: 哇，你装备挺齐全的啊。比我之前找的那个摄影师专业多了。
en: Wow, you've got quite the setup. Way more professional than the last photographer I hired.

zh: 那是当然。我们先去换衣服吧，那边有个废弃的值班室，可以当化妆间。
en: Of course. Let's go get changed first — there's an old abandoned guard shack over there we can use as a dressing room.

zh: 那个……实在是你太亮眼了，和这个环境形成的反差感太绝了，我作为设计生一时没忍住。
en: Um... it's just — you stand out so much, the contrast between you and this setting is incredible. As a design student, I couldn't help myself.

zh: 抱歉啊，我是山城大学设计系的林辰。其实我一直很喜欢Lolita风格的设计，冒昧问一句，可以加个好友认识一下吗？
en: Sorry — I'm Lin Chen, design major at Mountain City University. I've always been a big fan of Lolita fashion. Mind if I add you as a friend?

zh: 上来就要好友？你这人还真是直接。
en: Straight to asking for my contact? You don't waste time, do you.

zh: 先把照片给我看看，拍得不好，不光删图，别想再搭话。
en: Let me see the photo first. If it's bad, you're deleting it and we're done talking.

zh: ……没想到构图和光影居然这么到位。
en: ...Didn't expect the composition and lighting to be this on point.

zh: 巧了，我也是山城大学的，大一服装设计。这身裙子就是我自己设计的。
en: Small world — I'm at Mountain City U too, freshman in fashion design. This dress? I made it myself.

zh: （大吃一惊）原来你就是设计师！难怪气质这么特别，和那些只会穿衣服的完全不一样。
en: （completely surprised）So you're the designer! No wonder you carry yourself differently — nothing like those people who just wear the clothes without understanding them.

zh: 看你也算有点审美。正好，我缺摄影师和视觉设计，要不要来帮我做事？顺便……好友也可以加。
en: At least you've got some taste. Lucky for you, I need a photographer and visual designer. Want to work for me? And... I guess I'll add you too.

zh: 课业挺多的，但我可以抽空帮忙。加好友没问题。
en: My schedule's pretty packed, but I can make time to help. Adding you is no problem.

zh: 算你运气好。后续工作细节我微信发你，明天老城区碰面选拍摄地，别迟到。
en: Lucky you. I'll send you the work details on WeChat. Meet tomorrow in the old town to scout locations. Don't be late.

zh: 我说，你夏天穿这么厚不热吗？我看着都替你热。
en: Seriously though, aren't you dying in that thick dress in this heat? Just looking at you makes me sweat.

zh: 体寒还流这么多汗？我看你就是爱美不要命。小心中暑了没人管你。
en: You have poor circulation but you're dripping sweat? You're literally killing yourself for fashion. Heatstroke's gonna get you and nobody's gonna be around to help.

zh: 你少贫嘴！专心找场地。再废话我扣你工资。
en: Less talking, more scouting! Keep running your mouth and I'm cutting your pay.

zh: 这里不行，太普通了。
en: No, this is too boring.

zh: 前面看看。
en: Let's check further ahead.

zh: 这里完美！林辰你眼光可以啊。
en: This is perfect! Lin Chen, you've got a good eye.

zh: 那当然，也不看是谁。
en: Well yeah, who do you think I am?

zh: 臭美。
en: Full of yourself.

zh: 糟糕，下雨了！
en: Oh no, it's raining!

zh: 幸好我带了伞，一起走吧。
en: Good thing I brought an umbrella. Let's share.

zh: 进来躲雨吃碗冰粉吧。
en: Come in, get out of the rain and have some iced jelly.

zh: 这家冰粉真的好好吃。下次我们还来这里吃好不好？
en: This place is seriously good. Can we come here again next time?

zh: 好啊，下次我请你。
en: Sure, next time it's on me.

zh: 谁要你请……我自己有钱。
en: Who said I need you to pay... I've got my own money.

zh: 今天辛苦啦，下次拍摄再联系。
en: Good work today. I'll text you about the next shoot.

zh: 对了，以后不许随便搭讪陌生人，也就我好心理你。
en: And hey — no randomly hitting on strangers from now on. You got lucky I was nice enough to respond.

zh: 知道啦，我的大设计师。以后只搭讪你一个人。
en: Got it, my dear designer. From now on, I'll only hit on you.

zh: 哼，油嘴滑舌。
en: Hmph, smooth talker.

zh: 你居然偷拍我？
en: Did you just take a photo of me without asking?

zh: （瞬间慌乱，手脚无措，说话语无伦次）啊、啊我不是故意的！主要是你长得太好看了，我一时看呆了才拍照的……
en: （panicking instantly, flailing, words all jumbled）Ah—ah I didn't mean to! It's just — you're so beautiful, I completely froze and just... took the picture...

zh: 别生气嘛，就一张照片而已，多大点事。要不……我请你喝东西，交个朋友？
en: Hey don't be mad, it's just one photo, no big deal. How about... I buy you a drink and we get to know each other?

zh: 够了。
en: Enough.

zh: 先是偷拍别人，现在又说这种轻浮的话，真让人不舒服。
en: First you sneak a picture of me, now you're hitting on me like it's nothing. That's just gross.

zh: 不是，我真没有别的意思，你别多想啊！不就是拍张照吗，至于这么生气吗？
en: No, I really didn't mean anything by it, don't overthink it! It's just a photo — why get so worked up over nothing?

zh: 不用解释了。随手偷拍别人，还一副理所当然的样子，**真是个下头男**。
en: Save it. Taking creep shots like it's no big deal, then acting like I'm the problem — **you're disgusting**.

zh: 把照片立刻删掉，以后离我远一点。
en: Delete it right now. And stay away from me from now on.

zh: 对不起……是我失态了。
en: I'm sorry... I overstepped.

zh: 没必要再说了。
en: There's nothing more to say.

zh: 那边的值班室还能用，我去换衣服。你先把设备架好，试一下光。
en: That guard shack over there is still usable. I'm going to change. You set up the gear and test the lighting.

zh: 不许偷看！
en: And don't you peek!

zh: 知道了，我又不是变态。
en: Got it, I'm not a creep.

zh: 看什么看？没见过啊？
en: What are you staring at? Never seen a lolita dress before?

zh: 没什么，就是觉得……比我想象中还要好看。
en: Nothing, just... it's even more beautiful than I imagined.

zh: 哼，算你有眼光。赶紧开始拍吧，早点拍完早点收工。
en: Hmph. At least you've got an eye for it. Let's just get this shoot done so we can wrap up early.

zh: 头稍微低一点，眼神再冷一点……对，就是这样。
en: Tilt your head down a little... colder with the eyes... yeah, just like that.

zh: 手放在腰上，身体微微侧转……完美。
en: Hand on your hip, turn your body slightly... perfect.

zh: 保持住，眼神看远方……很好。
en: Hold it, eyes toward the distance... great.

zh: 好了，这组拍完了。我们休息一下吧。
en: Okay, that's this set done. Let's take a break.

zh: 你脚踝受伤了？
en: Did you hurt your ankle?

zh: 没有啊，我好好的。
en: No, I'm fine.

zh: 就是站久了有点麻而已。
en: It's just a bit numb from standing too long.

zh: 别装了，我都看到了。是不是早上来的时候扭到的？
en: Stop pretending, I saw it. You twisted it coming here this morning, didn't you?

zh: 就……一点点而已，不碍事。
en: It's... just a little. It's nothing.

zh: 都一瘸一拐了还说不碍事？过来坐下，我帮你看看。
en: You're literally limping and you say it's nothing? Come sit down, let me take a look.

zh: 少废话，过来。
en: Less talking, more moving. Come here.

zh: 喂！你干什么啊！放开我！
en: Hey! What are you doing?! Let go of me!

zh: （小声嘟囔）真是的，一点都不温柔。
en: （muttering under her breath）Honestly... not a single gentle bone in his body.

zh: 听话，要是伤势加重了，后面的拍摄就没法进行了。
en: Be reasonable. If it gets worse, we won't be able to finish the rest of the shoot.

zh: 我学过一点急救，不会弄疼你的。
en: I know some first aid. I won't hurt you.

zh: ……那好吧。
en: ……Fine.

zh: 都肿成这样了，你还硬撑着拍了两个小时？你是傻子吗？
en: It's this swollen and you toughed it out for two hours? Are you an idiot?

zh: 要你管啊……本来以为忍忍就过去了。
en: Mind your own business... I thought if I just sucked it up it'd go away.

zh: 而且……这是新款裙子的第一次拍摄，我不想搞砸。
en: Besides... this is the first shoot for my new dress design. I didn't want to mess it up.

zh: 幸好我包里带了云南白药。先给你喷点药，然后用冰袋敷一下。
en: Good thing I had Yunnan Baiyao in my bag. Let me spray some on first, then ice it.

zh: 嘶……轻点。
en: Ssssh... easy.

zh: 忍一下，很快就好。
en: Bear with it, almost done.

zh: ……谢谢你。
en: ……Thank you.

zh: 不用谢。谁让我是你的专属摄影师呢。
en: Don't mention it. I am your personal photographer, after all.

zh: 谁……谁要你专属了。
en: Who... who said anything about personal?

zh: 啊！怎么回事？！
en: Ah! What's going on?!

zh: 停电了吗？
en: Did the power go out?

zh: 别慌，应该是工厂的老线路出问题了。
en: Don't panic. Must be the old wiring in this factory.

zh: 我手机有手电筒。
en: I've got the flashlight on my phone.

zh: （声音有点发抖）那……那我们现在怎么办？
en: （voice trembling slightly）So... what do we do now?

zh: 怎么，害怕了？
en: What, scared?

zh: 谁……谁害怕了！我只是……只是有点意外而已。
en: Who... who's scared! I'm just... a little surprised, that's all.

zh: 别怕，有我在呢。
en: Don't be scared. I'm here.

zh: 谁要你保护啊。
en: I don't need your protection.

zh: 别担心，我在这里。
en: Don't worry. I'm right here.

zh: 我们就在这里等一会儿，应该很快就会来电的。
en: Let's just wait here a bit. The power should be back soon.
……Mm-hmm.

zh: 好无聊啊……我们说点什么吧。
en: This is so boring... let's talk about something.

zh: 好啊。那你先说，你学生时代有没有什么特别糗的事？
en: Sure. You go first. Did anything super embarrassing happen to you back in school?

zh: 我才没有什么糗事呢。我一直都是完美的。
en: I don't have embarrassing stories. I've always been flawless.

zh: 是吗？我才不信。每个人都有糗事的。
en: Oh really? I don't buy it. Everyone's got something.

zh: ……好吧，就告诉你一件。
en: ……Fine. I'll tell you one.

zh: 高一的时候，有一次我穿Lolita裙去上学，结果裙摆被自行车链条勾住了，摔了个狗吃屎。
en: Freshman year of high school, I wore a Lolita dress to school and the hem got caught in a bike chain. I ate dirt in front of everyone.

zh: 当时全校的人都看着我，我恨不得找个地缝钻进去。
en: The whole school was staring at me. I wanted to crawl into a hole and disappear.

zh: 哈哈哈哈！没想到你还有这种时候！
en: Hahahaha! I can't believe you of all people!

zh: 不许笑！再笑我就扣你工资！
en: Stop laughing! One more peep and I'm docking your pay!

zh: 好好好，我不笑了。
en: Okay, okay, I'll stop.

zh: 那我也告诉你一件我的糗事吧。大一军训的时候，我顺拐了整整一个星期，被教官单独拉出来训练。
en: Alright, here's mine. During freshman military training, I marched with the same arm and leg for an entire week. The drill sergeant pulled me out for solo practice.

zh: 哈哈哈哈！顺拐！太好笑了！
en: Hahahaha! Same-arm-same-leg! That's hilarious!

zh: 啊！来电了！
en: Ah! The power's back!

zh: 太好了！终于可以回去了！
en: Finally! We can head back!

zh: 等等，你看外面。
en: Wait. Look outside.

zh: 怎么了？
en: What is it?

zh: 天已经黑了，月亮出来了。现在的光线……拍夜景应该会很好看。
en: It's dark now, and the moon's out. This light... night shots would look amazing.

zh: 对哦！我怎么没想到！
en: Oh yeah! Why didn't I think of that!

zh: 我们拍一组夜景吧！就当是加更！
en: Let's do a night set! Consider it a bonus round!

zh: 可是你的脚……
en: But your ankle...

zh: 我的脚没事！已经不疼了！真的！
en: My ankle's fine! It doesn't hurt anymore! Really!

zh: 求求你了，就拍一组好不好？这个机会太难得了。
en: Please, just one set? This opportunity is way too good to pass up.

zh: 好吧好吧，真是怕了你了。
en: Fine, fine. You win.

zh: 哇……这里好美啊。
en: Wow... this place is gorgeous.

zh: 我从来不知道，废弃工厂后面还有这么漂亮的地方。
en: I had no idea there was a spot this beautiful behind the abandoned factory.

zh: 嗯？那是什么？
en: Huh? What's that?

zh: 萤火虫！
en: Fireflies!

zh: 是萤火虫！好多萤火虫！
en: They're fireflies! So many of them!

zh: 哇！太漂亮了！
en: Wow! They're beautiful!

zh: 我长这么大，还是第一次看到这么多萤火虫！
en: I've lived this long and this is the first time I've seen so many fireflies!

zh: 林辰，你看！那只萤火虫飞到我手上了！
en: Lin Chen, look! One just landed on my hand!

zh: 你看你看！它在发光！
en: Look, look! It's glowing!

zh: 是啊，真的很漂亮。
en: Yeah, it really is beautiful.

zh: 林辰，快帮我拍几张照片！我要和萤火虫合影！
en: Lin Chen, quick, take some photos of me! I want a picture with the fireflies!

zh: 哇……这里的夜景好美啊。
en: Wow... the night view here is gorgeous.

zh: 我以前怎么没发现，山城的夜晚这么漂亮。
en: How come I never noticed how beautiful this city looks at night?

zh: 因为你以前总是一个人忙着工作，从来没有停下来好好看过这个城市。
en: Because you were always busy working alone, and you never stopped to really look at this city.

zh: ……也许吧。
en: ...Maybe you're right.

zh: 你看，好多星星啊。
en: Look, so many stars.

zh: 嗯。今天天气好，能看到很多平时看不到的星星。
en: Mm-hmm. The weather's clear tonight, so you can see a lot of stars that are usually hidden.

zh: 我小时候，在英国的时候，也经常和妈妈一起看星星。
en: When I was little, back in England, I used to watch the stars with my mom all the time.

zh: 那时候，妈妈会告诉我每一颗星星的名字，还给我讲关于星星的故事。
en: She'd tell me the name of every star, and tell me stories about them too.

zh: 后来回到中国，就再也没有人陪我看星星了。
en: After I came back to China, there was no one to watch the stars with me anymore.

zh: 刚回来的时候，我一句中文都不会说，长得也和别人不一样。
en: When I first got back, I couldn't speak a word of Chinese, and I didn't look like anyone else either.

zh: 同学们都欺负我，叫我「洋鬼子」，不愿意和我玩。
en: The other kids bullied me, called me a 'foreign devil,' and wouldn't play with me.

zh: 我每天都一个人吃饭，一个人放学，一个人待在教室里。
en: Every day I ate alone, walked home alone, sat in the classroom alone.

zh: 那时候我就在想，是不是我真的很讨厌，所以大家都不喜欢我。
en: Back then I kept wondering... maybe I really am unlikeable, and that's why nobody wants me around.

zh: 不是的。你一点都不讨厌。
en: That's not true. You're not unlikeable at all.

zh: 你很坚强，很勇敢，为了自己的梦想一直在努力。
en: You're strong and brave, and you've been working so hard for your dream.

zh: 你设计的裙子很漂亮，你拍的照片也很好看。
en: The dresses you design are beautiful, and the photos you take are stunning too.

zh: 很多人都喜欢你，只是你不知道而已。
en: A lot of people like you — you just don't realize it.

zh: ……真的吗？
en: ...Really?

zh: 真的。
en: Really.

zh: 而且……以后我陪你看星星。
en: And... from now on, I'll watch the stars with you.

zh: 以后你再也不是一个人了。
en: You won't be alone anymore.

zh: 谁……谁要你陪啊。
en: Who... who asked you to?

zh: 不过……如果你非要陪的话，我也不是不可以勉强接受。
en: But... if you really insist, I suppose I could reluctantly allow it.

zh: 好了，我到了。
en: Alright, I'm here.

zh: 我送你上去吧。你的脚还没好。
en: Let me walk you up. Your ankle's still not healed.

zh: 不用了，我自己可以的。
en: No need, I can manage on my own.

zh: 再说了，男生不能进女生宿舍。
en: Besides, guys aren't allowed in the girls' dorm.

zh: 那好吧。你自己小心点。
en: Alright then. Take care.

zh: 今天……谢谢你。
en: Today... thank you.

zh: 不仅帮我拍了这么多好看的照片，还……陪我看了星星。
en: Not just for taking all those great photos, but also... for watching the stars with me.

zh: 这是我过得最开心的一天。
en: This is the happiest day I've ever had.

zh: 我也是。
en: Me too.

zh: 对了，明天早上八点，我们在学校门口见。
en: Oh, and — tomorrow at 8 AM, let's meet at the school gate.

zh: 一起去印刷厂看宣传册的样稿。
en: We need to go to the printer to check the brochure proofs.

zh: 好。我准时到。
en: Got it. I'll be there on time.

zh: 拜拜。
en: Bye.

zh: 早啊。
en: Morning.

zh: 早。你的脚怎么样了？
en: Morning. How's your ankle?

zh: 没事了，已经不疼了。
en: It's fine, doesn't hurt anymore.

zh: 是吗？那你走两步给我看看。
en: Oh yeah? Then walk a couple steps. Let me see.

zh: 切，不看就不看。
en: Hmph, fine, don't look then.

zh: 给你买的早餐，豆浆是热的。还有这个，记得按时喷药。
en: I got you breakfast — the soy milk's still hot. And this, don't forget to spray it on time.

zh: ……谢谢。
en: ...Thanks.

zh: 你怎么知道我没吃早饭？
en: How did you know I hadn't eaten breakfast?

zh: 猜的。毕竟某人昨天为了拍夜景，连晚饭都没吃。
en: Lucky guess. Besides, someone skipped dinner last night just to shoot night scenes.

zh: 谁让你拍那么慢的。
en: Well whose fault is it for taking so long?

zh: 好好好，我的错。快吃吧，不然凉了。
en: Alright, alright, my bad. Eat up before it gets cold.

zh: 安小姐来了啊，样稿已经印出来了，您看看。
en: Miss An, you're here. The proofs are ready, take a look.

zh: 太好了！终于出来了！
en: Great! Finally!

zh: 这……这不对啊。
en: This... this isn't right.

zh: 这是怎么回事？！我给你们的色值明明是正确的！
en: What happened?! I gave you the exact right color values!

zh: 实在抱歉安小姐，昨天晚上我们的印刷机出了点故障，颜色校准出了问题。
en: I'm so sorry, Miss An. Last night our printing press had a malfunction — the color calibration went off.

zh: 您放心，我们马上重新印，一定给您印好。
en: Don't worry, we'll reprint immediately. We'll get it right this time.

zh: 重新印？什么时候能印好？
en: Reprint? When can it be done?

zh: 最快也要三天。
en: At the earliest, three days.

zh: 三天？！不行！绝对不行！
en: Three days?! No! Absolutely not!

zh: 我的新品发布会就在三天后！宣传册必须今天印好，明天就要发出去！
en: My new collection launch is in three days! The brochures need to be done today and sent out tomorrow!

zh: 这……这实在是没办法啊。机器已经排满了，最快也要后天才能给您开机。
en: I... I really can't do anything about it. The machines are fully booked — the earliest I can squeeze you in is the day after tomorrow.

zh: 怎么会这样……
en: How did this happen...

zh: （声音带着哭腔）怎么办……一切都搞砸了……
en: （voice trembling with tears）What do I do... everything's ruined...

zh: 我跑了十几家工厂才做出满意的样衣，熬了无数个通宵才设计好宣传册……
en: I went to over a dozen factories to get the samples right, pulled countless all-nighters to design the brochure...

zh: 我以为一切都会很顺利的……
en: I thought everything would go smoothly...

zh: 是不是我真的不行？是不是我根本就不适合做品牌？
en: Maybe I'm just not good enough? Maybe I was never cut out to run a brand?

zh: 不是的。你很优秀，真的。
en: That's not true. You're amazing, really.

zh: 你的设计很有才华，你的努力我都看在眼里。
en: You have real talent in your designs, and I've seen how hard you've been working.

zh: 这点小挫折算不了什么，我们一起想办法解决。
en: This little setback is nothing. We'll figure it out together.

zh: 别慌，现在哭解决不了问题。
en: Don't panic. Crying won't fix anything right now.

zh: 我们还有时间，一定能想到办法的。
en: We still have time. We'll find a way.

zh: 先告诉我，宣传册的源文件在你那里吗？
en: First, tell me — do you have the brochure source files on your computer?

zh: 这确实很麻烦。印刷厂的机器坏了，我们时间又不多了。
en: This is really a pain. The printing press broke down, and we're running out of time.

zh: 如果今天印不出来，发布会就赶不上了。
en: If we can't get it printed today, we'll miss the launch event.

zh: ……在我电脑里。
en: ......They're on my laptop.

zh: 那就好办了。
en: Then we're in luck.

zh: 印刷厂的机器不行，我们可以找数码快印店。虽然成本高一点，但今天就能印好。
en: If the press is down, we can use a digital print shop. It'll cost more, but they can have it done today.

zh: 不过我们需要重新调整颜色参数，把偏差修正过来。
en: We'll just need to recalibrate the color settings to fix the offset.

zh: 真的吗？可是……重新调整颜色要花很长时间的。
en: Really? But... recalibrating the colors would take forever.

zh: 没关系，我陪你一起改。
en: No worries. I'll help you fix it.

zh: 大不了通宵一晚上，肯定能赶在明天早上印好。
en: Even if we have to pull an all-nighter, we'll get it done by morning.

zh: ……可是你的作业怎么办？你不是说这周要交课程设计吗？
en: ......But what about your assignment? Didn't you say your project is due this week?

zh: 作业可以晚点交，但你的发布会不能推迟。
en: I can turn in my homework late. Your launch event can't be postponed.

zh: 我说过，我是你的专属设计师兼摄影师。你的事，就是我的事。
en: I told you — I'm your personal designer and photographer. Your problems are my problems.

zh: （小声）林辰……
en: (softly) Lin Chen......

zh: 这里的红色再加深一点……还有这个银色，要更亮一点。
en: Let's deepen the red here a bit... and make this silver brighter.

zh: 不行，再亮就会显得廉价了。稍微降低一点饱和度，增加一点灰度。
en: No, any brighter and it'll look cheap. Dial the saturation down a notch and add a touch of gray.

zh: 嗯，有道理。
en: Mm-hmm, good point.

zh: （打了个哈欠）好累啊……
en: (yawns) I'm so tired......

zh: 给你买的咖啡，提提神。
en: I got you some coffee. Wake you up a bit.

zh: 谢谢。
en: Thanks.

zh: 喂，林辰。你说你这么帮我，是不是喜欢我啊？
en: Hey, Lin Chen. You're going this far to help me... you like me, don't you?

zh: （差点把咖啡喷出来）你胡说什么呢。
en: (nearly spits out his coffee) What are you even talking about?

zh: 切，不说就算了。
en: Tch. Fine, don't admit it.

zh: （小声嘟囔）明明就是……
en: (muttering under her breath) As if it's not obvious...

zh: 林辰。对不起啊，耽误你这么多时间。
en: Lin Chen. I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time.

zh: 没事。能帮到你就好。
en: It's fine. I'm glad I could help.

zh: 其实……我以前从来没有和别人一起工作过。
en: The thing is... I've never really worked with anyone before.

zh: 我总是觉得，别人做的东西都达不到我的要求，所以什么事都自己扛着。
en: I always felt like no one else's work would meet my standards, so I just carried everything myself.

zh: 但是和你一起工作，我觉得很安心。
en: But working with you... it feels safe. I feel at ease.

zh: （心里一阵温暖。）以后有什么事，都可以告诉我。不用一个人硬撑着。
en: (A warmth spreads through his heart.) From now on, whatever happens, you can tell me. You don't have to tough it out alone.

zh: 太好了！终于改完了！
en: Yes! Finally done!

zh: 是啊。现在发给店家，早上八点就能印好。
en: Yeah. Send it to the shop now, and it'll be ready by eight in the morning.

zh: 发送成功！终于可以回家睡觉了！
en: Sent! Now I can finally go home and crash!

zh: 哇，雨下得好大啊。
en: Whoa, it's really pouring out there.

zh: 我带了伞。走吧，我送你回宿舍。
en: I brought an umbrella. Come on, I'll walk you back to your dorm.

zh: 喂，伞歪了。
en: Hey, the umbrella's tilted.

zh: 没有啊，正好。
en: No it's not. It's perfectly straight.

zh: 明明就歪了！你都淋湿了！笨蛋……
en: It is too! You're soaked! Idiot......

zh: 我到了。你的肩膀都湿透了……回去赶紧洗个热水澡，别感冒了。
en: I'm here. Your shoulder's drenched... go take a hot shower when you get back. Don't catch a cold.

zh: 知道了。你也赶紧上去休息吧。
en: Got it. You should head upstairs and rest too.

zh: 今天……真的谢谢你。如果没有你，我真的不知道该怎么办。
en: Today... I really mean it, thank you. If it weren't for you, I don't know what I would've done.

zh: 晚安，林辰。
en: Good night, Lin Chen.

zh: 晚安。
en: Good night.

zh: 宣传册印好了！效果特别好！你醒了吗？我请你吃饭！
en: The brochures are done! They look amazing! Are you awake? I'm treating you to a meal!

zh: 你怎么了？哪里不舒服？
en: What's wrong? Are you feeling unwell?

zh: 没事，就是有点发烧，睡一觉就好了。
en: It's nothing. Just running a bit of a fever. I'll be fine after some sleep.

zh: 发烧？多少度？
en: A fever? What's your temperature?

zh: 不知道……没量。
en: No idea... didn't check.

zh: 你等着！我马上过来！
en: Stay there! I'm coming over right now!

zh: 哎？不用了，我真的没事……
en: Huh? No, don't — I'm really fine......

zh: （气喘吁吁）你怎么样了？
en: (out of breath) How are you feeling?

zh: 没事……就是有点晕。
en: Okay... just a bit dizzy.

zh: 快回床上躺着去！来，量一下体温。
en: Get back in bed right now! Here, let me take your temperature.

zh: 都烧成这样了还说没事！你是不是傻啊！
en: A fever this high and you say it's nothing! Are you an idiot?!

zh: 哪有那么严重……
en: It's not that bad......

zh: 39度2！还说不严重！你等着，我去给你买药！
en: 39.2! And you still say it's not bad?! Wait here, I'm getting you medicine!

zh: 来，吃药。
en: Here, take your medicine.

zh: 你饿不饿？我给你煮点粥吧。
en: Are you hungry? I'll make you some congee.

zh: 你会煮粥？
en: You know how to cook congee?

zh: 当然会！你别小看人！
en: Of course I do! Don't underestimate me!

zh: 粥来了！
en: Congee's ready!

zh: （看着碗里黑乎乎的东西）这……这是粥？
en: (staring at the dark lumpy thing in the bowl) This... this is congee?

zh: 呃……可能火有点大了……不过应该能吃！
en: Uhh... the heat might've been a bit too high... but it should still be edible!

zh: （味道一言难尽，但看着她期待的眼神，我还是全部吃完了。）好吃。
en: (The taste defies description, but faced with her hopeful eyes, I finish every last bite.) It's good.

zh: 真的吗？那我以后经常做给你吃！
en: Really? Then I'll make it for you all the time!

zh: （连忙摆手）不用不用！太麻烦你了！
en: (waves his hands frantically) No no no! That's way too much trouble!

zh: 切，好心没好报。
en: Hmph, no good deed goes unpunished.

zh: 感觉怎么样了？
en: How are you feeling now?

zh: 好多了，谢谢你。
en: Much better. Thank you.

zh: 对不起……都是因为我，你才会生病的。
en: I'm sorry... it's all my fault you got sick.

zh: 不关你的事。是我自己不小心。而且，能帮到你，我很高兴。
en: It's not your fault. I was careless. And... I'm glad I could help you.

zh: 林辰。
en: Lin Chen.

zh: 以前我总是觉得，什么事都要靠自己，别人都靠不住。
en: I used to think I had to do everything myself, that no one else could be counted on.

zh: 但是遇到你之后，我才发现，原来有人可以依靠的感觉，这么好。
en: But after meeting you... I realized how good it feels to have someone to lean on.

zh: 原来……我不是一个人在战斗。
en: Turns out... I'm not fighting alone.

zh: 你从来都不是一个人。以后，我会一直陪着你。
en: You've never been alone. From now on, I'll always be here with you.

zh: 时间不早了，我该回去了。你好好休息。
en: It's getting late. I should head back. Get some rest.

zh: 对了，下周三我们要去郊区的工厂选布料。等你病好了，我们一起去。
en: Oh, and next Wednesday we're going to the factory in the suburbs to pick fabrics. Once you're better, we'll go together.

zh: 好。
en: Okay.

zh: 早啊！
en: Morning!

zh: 早。东西都带齐了吗？
en: Morning. Got everything?

zh: 带齐了！色卡、样布、笔记本，一样都没少。
en: All set! Color swatches, fabric samples, notebook — nothing missing.

zh: 今天我们要去郊区的那家布料厂，他们家的蕾丝质量是整个山城最好的。
en: Today we're heading to that fabric mill in the suburbs. Their lace is the best in all of Chongqing.

zh: 好，那我们走吧。
en: Alright, let's go.

zh: 安小姐来了啊！这次要找什么布料？
en: Miss An! Here again! What kind of fabric are you after this time?

zh: 王老板好。我要找一款黑色的哑光蕾丝，还有银色的刺绣线。
en: Hello, Boss Wang. I'm looking for a matte black lace, and some silver embroidery thread.

zh: 就是上次我跟你说的那款，要最柔软的那种，不能扎皮肤。
en: The one I mentioned last time — the softest kind you've got. Nothing that'll irritate the skin.

zh: （拿起一卷蕾丝仔细地摸着，眉头微微皱起）这个不行，太硬了。穿在身上会不舒服。
en: （Picks up a roll of lace, feeling it carefully, brow furrowing slightly）No good. Too stiff. It'd be uncomfortable to wear.

zh: 还有别的吗？
en: Got anything else?

zh: 有有有，这边还有一批进口的，你看看。
en: Yes, yes — we've got an imported batch over here. Take a look.

zh: （拿起另一卷蕾丝，眼睛一下子亮了）就是这个！这个手感太好了！
en: （Picks up another roll of lace, eyes lighting up instantly）This is it! The texture is perfect!

zh: 王老板，就要这个，给我来五百米。还有银色的刺绣线，也要最好的那种。
en: Boss Wang, I'll take this one — five hundred meters. And the silver embroidery thread, the best you've got.

zh: 没问题！安小姐的眼光就是好，这批货刚到，你是第一个看上的。
en: No problem! Miss An has an eye for quality — this batch just arrived, and you're the first to spot it.

zh: 年纪轻轻就这么能干，自己做品牌，真了不起啊。
en: So young and already running your own label. That's really impressive.

zh: （耳朵一下子红了）哪里哪里，都是王老板照顾。
en: （Ears turning red）Oh, not at all — I couldn't have done it without your support, Boss Wang.

zh: 好了，王老板，合同签好了。下周三之前能发货吗？
en: Alright, Boss Wang, the contract's signed. Can you ship it before next Wednesday?

zh: 没问题！一定准时送到。
en: No problem! It'll arrive right on time.

zh: （伸了个懒腰）呼……终于搞定了！
en: （Stretching）Phew... finally done!

zh: 没想到这么顺利，比我预想的早了好几个小时。
en: Didn't expect it to go this smoothly — we finished hours earlier than I thought.

zh: 那个……今天下午没事了。
en: So, uh... I've got nothing on this afternoon.

zh: 正好我也饿了。我知道老城区有一家特别地道的九宫格老火锅，要不要去试试？
en: I'm getting hungry too. There's this really authentic nine-grid old-school hotpot place in the old town. Want to check it out?

zh: 好啊好啊！我早就想吃火锅了！
en: Yes, yes! I've been craving hotpot forever!

zh: （连忙清了清嗓子）咳……既然你这么诚心邀请，那我就勉强陪你去吧。
en: （Quickly clears throat）Ahem... well, since you're asking so sincerely, I suppose I can reluctantly keep you company.

zh: 那我先回学校了，还有点作业要写。
en: I'll head back to campus first, got some homework to finish.

zh: ……哦，好吧。那……宣传册的事，我们微信联系。
en: ...Oh. Okay. Then... I'll message you on WeChat about the brochure.

zh: 你来啦。快坐吧，我已经点好菜了。
en: You're here. Sit down — I already ordered.

zh: 不好意思，让你久等了。
en: Sorry to keep you waiting.

zh: 哼，知道就好。今天主要是讨论宣传册的事，你别想太多。
en: Hmph, good that you know. Today's mainly about the brochure, so don't get any ideas.

zh: 好，听你的。
en: Alright, whatever you say.

zh: 哇……好多人啊。
en: Wow... it's packed.

zh: 这家店开了二十多年了，味道特别正宗，所以每天都爆满。
en: This place has been around for over twenty years — the flavors are legit, so it's packed every single day.

zh: （看着桌上的九宫格锅底）这个……为什么要分成九个格子啊？
en: （Looking at the nine-grid pot on the table）This... why are there nine compartments?

zh: 不同的格子温度不一样，中间的火最大，适合涮毛肚鸭肠这种需要快煮的，边上的火小，适合煮土豆藕片这种需要慢炖的。
en: Each compartment has a different temperature. The center's the hottest — good for quick-cook stuff like tripe and duck intestines. The edges are cooler, better for slow-simmer things like potato and lotus root.

zh: 哦……原来是这样。
en: Oh... I see.

zh: 两位要点什么锅底？我们这里有微辣、中辣、特辣。
en: What broth base would you like? We've got mild, medium, and extra-spicy.

zh: （偷偷看了我一眼）那就……特辣吧！我能吃辣！
en: （Steals a glance at me）Then... extra-spicy! I can handle it!

zh: 是吗？我怎么记得上次有人吃小面都被辣得直吐舌头。
en: Oh really? Funny, I seem to remember someone who couldn't even handle spicy noodles without fanning her tongue.

zh: 那是意外！我现在很能吃辣了！
en: That was a fluke! I'm way better with spice now!

zh: 好好好，那就微辣吧。我不能吃太辣。
en: Alright, alright — let's go with mild. I can't handle too much spice.

zh: （偷偷松了一口气）好吧，那就听你的，微辣。
en: （Breathes a quiet sigh of relief）Fine, you win. Mild it is.

zh: 哇……开了开了！
en: Wow... it's boiling!

zh: （拿起筷子就要往锅里放毛肚）这个要煮多久啊？
en: （Picks up chopsticks, ready to drop tripe in）How long does this need to cook?

zh: 等等，我教你。毛肚要七上八下，就是在锅里涮八次，每次提起来一下，这样煮出来的毛肚才会脆。
en: Wait, let me show you. Tripe needs 'seven ups, eight downs' — you dip it in and out eight times. That's what makes it crispy.

zh: （手被我抓住，脸一下子红了）哦……哦好。
en: （I grab her hand, her face instantly turning red）Oh... okay.

zh: （小心翼翼地按照我说的方法涮着毛肚）这样……可以了吗？
en: （Carefully following my method, swishing the tripe）Like... this? Is it ready?

zh: 可以了，尝尝看。
en: Yep, try it.

zh: （咬了一口，眼睛一下子亮了）哇！好好吃！好脆啊！
en: （Takes a bite, eyes lighting up）Wow! This is amazing! So crunchy!

zh: 好吃就多吃点。
en: If you like it, have some more.

zh: 那个……你喜欢吃什么？
en: So... what do you like to eat?

zh: 我都可以，不挑食。
en: Anything, really. I'm not picky.

zh: 那你除了拍照和设计，还喜欢做什么？
en: Apart from photography and design, what else do you like doing?

zh: 喜欢看电影，还有爬山。山城的山很多，周末没事的时候我就会去爬山。
en: I like watching movies, and hiking. There are plenty of mountains in Chongqing — I go hiking on weekends when I'm free.

zh: 你呢？除了设计裙子，还喜欢做什么？
en: What about you? Besides designing dresses, what do you like?

zh: 我喜欢看星星，还有听古典音乐。
en: I like stargazing. And listening to classical music.

zh: 小时候在英国的时候，我家后面有一片很大的草地，晚上我就会躺在草地上看星星。
en: When I was little, back in England, there was a big meadow behind my house. I'd lie on the grass and watch the stars at night.

zh: 那时候的星星特别亮，比山城的亮多了。
en: The stars back then were so bright — way brighter than they are here in Chongqing.

zh: 以后我带你去南山看星星。南山的海拔高，没有光污染，星星也很亮。
en: I'll take you to Nanshan to see the stars someday. It's high up, no light pollution — the stars are really bright there too.

zh: 真的吗？
en: Really?

zh: （喝了一口酸梅汤）其实……我挺喜欢山城的。
en: （Takes a sip of sour plum drink）Actually... I've grown to like Chongqing quite a bit.

zh: 虽然夏天很热，冬天很冷，路也很难走，但这里的人很热情，东西也很好吃。
en: Sure, the summers are sweltering, winters freezing, and the streets are a pain to walk — but people here are warm, and the food's amazing.

zh: 而且……在这里，我遇到了很多喜欢我设计的人。
en: And... here, I've met so many people who actually love my designs.

zh: 以后你会遇到更多的。来，再喝一杯酸梅汤。解解辣。
en: You'll meet even more. Here, have another glass of sour plum drink. Cools down the spice.

zh: 今天的火锅真好吃。谢谢你请我吃火锅。
en: Today's hotpot was really good. Thanks for treating me.

zh: 不用谢。我也吃得很开心。
en: Don't mention it. I really enjoyed it too.

zh: （沉默了一会儿，轻声说）其实……今天是我生日。
en: （After a moment of silence, says softly）Actually... today's my birthday.

zh: 我知道。
en: I know.

zh: 你……你怎么知道？
en: You... how did you know?

zh: 拍宣传册那天，看到你身份证了。
en: The day we shot the brochure. I saw your ID.

zh: ……你记性真好。
en: ...You have a really good memory.

zh: 关于你的事，我都记得。给，生日礼物。
en: I remember everything about you. Here, your birthday present.

zh: 你……你还给我准备了礼物？
en: You... you even got me a gift?

zh: 打开看看吧。
en: Go on, open it.

zh: （看着照片，眼睛一下子红了）这是……那天晚上的萤火虫……
en: （Looking at the photo, eyes suddenly reddening）These are... the fireflies from that night...

zh: 嗯。我觉得这张照片拍得最好，所以打印出来送给你。
en: Mm-hmm. I thought this was the best shot I took, so I had it printed for you.

zh: 希望你每次看到它，都能想起那个美好的夜晚。
en: I hope every time you look at it, you'll remember that beautiful night.

zh: （眼泪一下子掉了下来）谢谢你……林辰。
en: （Tears streaming down）Thank you... Lin Chen.

zh: 这是我收到过最好的生日礼物。
en: This is the best birthday gift I've ever received.

zh: 以前从来没有人记得我的生日，也没有人给我送过礼物。
en: No one's ever remembered my birthday before. No one's ever given me a gift.

zh: 以后每年的生日，我都陪你过。
en: From now on, I'll be here for your birthday every single year.

zh: （红着眼眶，吸了吸鼻子）哼……还行吧，勉强及格。
en: （Eyes still red, sniffling）Hmph... it's okay, I guess. Barely passes.

zh: （小声）其实……挺好看的。
en: （Muttering）Actually... it's pretty nice.

zh: 喜欢就好。
en: Glad you like it.

zh: （靠在栏杆上，看着对岸的灯光）林辰，你知道我为什么要做Lolita品牌吗？
en: （Leaning on the railing, looking at the lights across the river）Lin Chen, do you know why I started a Lolita brand?

zh: 嗯？为什么？
en: Huh? Why?

zh: 小时候在英国，我喜欢穿Lolita裙，同学们都嘲笑我，说我穿得像个怪物。
en: When I was little in England, I loved wearing Lolita dresses. The other kids made fun of me, said I looked like a monster.

zh: 后来回到中国，又有人说我崇洋媚外，说我穿奇装异服。
en: Then when I came back to China, people said I was a foreign-worshipper, said I wore weird costumes.

zh: 那时候我就想，Lolita是我的盔甲。穿上它，我就可以变得很强大，就不会再被别人欺负了。
en: Back then I thought—Lolita is my armor. When I wear it, I can be strong. No one can hurt me anymore.

zh: 不是盔甲。
en: It's not armor.

zh: 嗯？
en: Huh?

zh: 是翅膀。穿上它的你，是最自由的。
en: It's wings. When you wear it, you're free.

zh: （转过头看着我，眼睛里闪烁着泪光）翅膀……
en: （Turns to look at me, tears glistening in her eyes）Wings...

zh: 林辰……谢谢你出现在我的生命里。
en: Lin Chen... thank you for coming into my life.

zh: 如果没有你，我可能早就放弃了。
en: If it weren't for you, I might have given up a long time ago.

zh: 其实我也想说一样的话。遇到你之后，我的生活也变得不一样了。
en: Actually, I feel the same way. After I met you, my life changed too.

zh: （低下头，小声说）笨蛋。
en: （Lowers her head, mutters）Idiot.

zh: 我们是搭档嘛。你的事，就是我的事。
en: We're partners, aren't we? Your business is my business.

zh: ……哦，对。搭档。
en: ...Oh, right. Partners.

zh: 我到了。
en: I'm here.

zh: 嗯。上去吧，早点休息。
en: Mm-hmm. Go on up, get some rest.

zh: 今天……是我过得最开心的一个生日。
en: Today... was the happiest birthday I've ever had.

zh: 明年生日，你也来。
en: Next year, you're coming too.

zh: 你来了啊！快过来帮我看看这个吊牌有没有问题。
en: You're here! Come quick, check this hangtag—does it look okay?

zh: 没问题，设计得很好看。
en: It's fine. The design looks great.

zh: 那就好。所有的准备工作都差不多了，就等明天的样衣送到了。
en: Good. All the prep work is pretty much done, just waiting for the sample dress to arrive tomorrow.

zh: 这次的发布会我准备了很久，一定要成功。
en: I've been preparing for this runway show for so long. It has to succeed.

zh: 一定会成功的。你的设计这么好，大家都会喜欢的。
en: It will succeed. Your designs are amazing—everyone's going to love them.

zh: 哼，那是当然。也不看看是谁设计的。
en: Hmph, obviously. I mean, look who designed them.

zh: 喂？您好，是快递吗？
en: Hello? Hi, is this the courier?

zh: 对，是我的快递。麻烦您送上来吧，谢谢。
en: Yes, that's my package. Could you bring it up? Thanks.

zh: 太好了！样衣到了！
en: Yes! The sample's here!

zh: 来了来了！
en: Coming, coming!

zh: 您好，安小姐的快递。麻烦签收一下。
en: Hello, delivery for Miss An. Please sign here.

zh: 谢谢！
en: Thanks!

zh: 空的？箱子是空的！
en: Empty? The box is empty!

zh: 怎么会这样？
en: How... how is this possible?

zh: 不可能！我明明看着快递员把样衣装进去的！
en: No way! I literally saw the courier pack the dress inside!

zh: 样衣呢？我的样衣去哪里了？
en: Where's the sample? Where did my sample go?

zh: 喂！我的快递怎么是空的？！你把我的样衣弄到哪里去了？
en: Hey! How is my package empty?! Where did you take my sample dress?

zh: 什么？中转站搞错了？送到别的地方去了？
en: What? The sorting center made a mistake? It got sent somewhere else?

zh: 那什么时候能找回来？明天早上？不行！明天早上我就要用！
en: When can you find it? Tomorrow morning? No! I need it tomorrow morning!

zh: 完了……一切都完了。
en: It's over... everything's ruined.

zh: 明天就是发布会了，没有样衣，我怎么开发布会？
en: The runway show is tomorrow. Without the sample, how am I supposed to do the show?

zh: 所有人都在等着看我的笑话……我就知道，我根本就做不好……
en: Everyone's just waiting to watch me fail... I knew it, I can't do anything right...

zh: 我真的好没用……
en: I'm so useless...

zh: 安雅，别这样。
en: Anya, don't do this.

zh: 现在哭解决不了问题。我们还有时间。
en: Crying won't solve anything right now. We still have time.

zh: 先去快递中转站，一定能在今天晚上把样衣找回来。
en: Let's go to the courier's sorting center first. We'll definitely find the sample tonight.

zh: 备用布料不是还有吗？一晚上做不完，我们就做一晚上。
en: Don't we still have backup fabric? If we can't finish it in one night, we'll work through the night.

zh: 我陪你通宵。钉珠子、剪线头，我都能干。
en: I'll pull an all-nighter with you. Sewing beads, trimming threads—I can do it all.

zh: 相信我。我们现在就去快递中转站，一定能在今天晚上把样衣找回来。
en: Trust me. Let's go to the sorting center right now. We'll definitely get the sample back tonight.

zh: 可是……中转站那么大，那么多快递，我们怎么找？
en: But… the sorting center is huge, there are so many packages. How are we supposed to find it?

zh: 只要有一丝希望，就不能放弃。
en: As long as there's even a shred of hope, we can't give up.

zh: 你忘了吗？我们连印刷厂的危机都一起挺过来了。这次也一定可以的。
en: Remember? We got through that printing press crisis together. We can get through this too.

zh: 走吧。我陪你一起去找。
en: Come on. I'll go with you to look for it.

zh: 实在抱歉安小姐，是我们的工作人员失误，把您的快递和另一个同名的快递搞混了。
en: I'm so sorry, Miss An. Our staff made a mistake and mixed up your package with another one that had the same name.

zh: 那个快递已经被送到城西的一个小区了。我们已经联系了收件人，但是她不在家，要晚上八点才能回来。
en: That package was already delivered to a residential complex in the west part of town. We contacted the recipient, but she's not home — she won't be back until 8 PM tonight.

zh: 晚上八点？那我们现在就过去等她！
en: Eight PM? Then let's go over there right now and wait for her!

zh: 别担心，很快就能等到了。
en: Don't worry. It'll be here before you know it.

zh: 林辰，如果这次找不回样衣，怎么办？
en: Lin Chen… what if we can't get the sample dress back?

zh: 不会的。一定能找回来的。
en: We will. I know we'll get it back.

zh: 就算真的找不回来，我们还有备用布料。大不了通宵一晚上，重新做一件。
en: And even if we really can't get it back, we still have backup fabric. We can just pull an all-nighter and make a new one.

zh: 可是……一晚上根本做不完。「星夜」的刺绣那么复杂。
en: But… there's no way we can finish it in one night. The embroidery on 'Starlight' is way too intricate.

zh: 没关系。我陪你一起做。我虽然不会做衣服，但我可以帮你钉珠子，剪线头。
en: That's okay. I'll help you. I don't know how to sew clothes, but I can sew on beads and snip threads.

zh: 只要我们一起努力，就没有做不到的事。
en: As long as we work together, there's nothing we can't do.

zh: 有你在，真好。
en: I'm so glad you're here.

zh: 太好了……太好了……
en: Thank god… thank god…

zh: 我就说吧，一定能找回来的。
en: See? I told you we'd find it.

zh: 幸好没有弄坏，不然我真的不知道该怎么办了。
en: Good thing it's not damaged. I don't know what I would've done if it was.

zh: 我来帮你钉珠子吧。你告诉我怎么弄。
en: Let me help with the beads. Just show me what to do.

zh: 好。你看，就是这样，把珠子穿在针上，然后缝在裙子上。
en: Okay. Look, it's like this — thread the bead onto the needle, then stitch it onto the dress.

zh: 没什么。就是觉得……能遇到你，真好。
en: It's nothing. I just think… I'm really lucky to have met you.

zh: 可是……「星夜」上面的刺绣光是我一个人就要一个月。
en: But… the embroidery on 'Starlight' alone would take me a whole month by myself.

zh: 那就一起做。你负责刺绣和版型，我负责钉珠子、剪线头、熨烫。我们两个人，一晚上顶半个月。
en: Then we'll do it together. You handle the embroidery and pattern work, I'll handle the beads, thread trimming, and ironing. The two of us can cover half a month's work in one night.

zh: ……你真的愿意陪我疯？
en: …You're actually willing to go along with this crazy plan?

zh: 你说呢？从漫展那天开始，我不一直都在陪你疯吗？
en: What do you think? Haven't I been going along with your crazy plans ever since that con day?

zh: ……也是。那开工吧。
en: …Fair point. Let's get to work, then.

zh: ……居然真的做完了。
en: …I can't believe we actually finished it.

zh: 我就说吧。
en: Told you.

zh: 从今以后，不管你要拍什么，我都给你当模特。
en: From now on, whatever you want to shoot — I'll be your model.

zh: 一言为定。
en: It's a deal.

zh: 终于搞定了！
en: We're finally done!

zh: 现在才五点，还有四个小时发布会才开始。我们可以休息一下。
en: It's only five o'clock. The launch show isn't for another four hours. We can rest a bit.

zh: 好啊。
en: Sounds good.

zh: 好美啊。
en: It's beautiful…

zh: 嗯。好久没有看过日出了。
en: Mm-hmm. It's been so long since I last watched the sunrise.

zh: 其实……我有话想对你说。
en: Actually… there's something I've been wanting to tell you.

zh: 我也有话想对你说。
en: There's something I want to tell you too.

zh: 安雅，我喜欢你。
en: Anya… I like you.

zh: 从第一次在漫展角落看到你的时候，我就注意到你了。
en: I noticed you from the very first moment I saw you in that corner of the convention.

zh: 后来和你一起工作，一起经历了那么多事，我越来越喜欢你。
en: And then working with you, going through so much together — I just fell for you more and more.

zh: 喜欢你的倔强，喜欢你的认真，喜欢你嘴硬心软的样子。
en: I love how stubborn you are, how dedicated you are. I love how you act all tough but you're really soft inside.

zh: 我想做你的男朋友，想一直陪在你身边，和你一起把「暗夜蔷薇」做下去。
en: I want to be your boyfriend. I want to stay by your side and build 'Dark Night Rose' together with you.

zh: 笨蛋！你怎么现在才说！
en: You idiot! What took you so long to say it!

zh: 我早就喜欢你了！从你帮我处理伤口的时候，从你陪我通宵赶宣传册的时候，从你送我萤火虫照片的时候……
en: I've liked you for so long! Since the time you helped me with my wound, since the time you stayed up all night helping me with the promo booklet, since you gave me that photo of the fireflies…

zh: 我一直在等你说这句话。
en: I've been waiting for you to say it.

zh: 对不起，让你等了这么久。
en: I'm sorry I made you wait so long.

zh: 林辰，我喜欢你。真的很喜欢你。
en: Lin Chen… I like you. I really, really like you.

zh: 我不知道从什么时候开始，我的眼里就只有你了。
en: I don't even know when it happened, but you're the only one I see now.

zh: 我想和你在一起，不只是工作伙伴。
en: I want to be with you. Not just as work partners.

zh: 我也喜欢你。但是……我有点害怕。
en: I like you too. But… I'm a little scared.

zh: 我从来没有谈过恋爱，我不知道怎么和别人相处。
en: I've never been in a relationship before. I don't know how to… be with someone like that.

zh: 而且，我的品牌才刚刚起步，未来还有很多不确定的事情。
en: And my brand is just getting started. There are so many uncertainties ahead.

zh: 没关系。我们可以慢慢来。
en: That's okay. We can take it slow.

zh: 不管未来有什么困难，我都会陪你一起面对。
en: No matter what difficulties come, I'll face them with you.

zh: 那……我们就试试吧。
en: Then… let's give it a try.

zh: 对不起，林辰。
en: I'm sorry, Lin Chen.

zh: 我……我一直把你当成最好的搭档和朋友。
en: I… I've always thought of you as my best partner and friend.

zh: 我从来没有想过别的事情。
en: I've never really thought about… anything more than that.

zh: 没关系。是我唐突了。
en: It's okay. I shouldn't have sprung that on you.

zh: 那我们……还是做朋友吧。
en: Then… let's just stay friends.

zh: 啊！已经八点了！我们该去发布会现场了！
en: Ah! It's already eight! We need to get to the venue!

zh: 好。走吧。
en: Right. Let's go.

zh: 今天的发布会，一定会成功的。
en: Today's show is going to be a success. I know it.

zh: 一定会的。
en: It will be.

zh: 你怎么才来？我还以为你要迟到了。
en: You're cutting it close. I thought you were going to be late.

zh: 怎么会迟到。你的专属摄影师，永远不会缺席。
en: Late? Never. Your personal photographer never misses a show.

zh: 哼，算你识相。
en: Hmph. Good that you know it.

zh: 安小姐，还有十分钟发布会就要开始了。
en: Miss An, the show starts in ten minutes.

zh: 好，我知道了。
en: Okay, I'm on it.

zh: 我……我有点紧张。
en: I... I'm a bit nervous.

zh: （走到她身后，双手轻轻搭在她肩上）这几个月你熬了多少个通宵，为的不就是今天吗？
en: （Walking up behind her, gently resting hands on her shoulders）How many all-nighters did you pull these past few months? Isn't this what it was all for?

zh: 我会在台下，一直看着你。
en: I'll be right there in the crowd, watching you the whole time.

zh: 嗯。
en: Mm-hmm.

zh: 大家好，我是「暗夜蔷薇」的主理人安雅。
en: Hello everyone, I'm Anya, the founder and creative director of Nightshade Rose.

zh: 欢迎大家来到「星夜」系列新品发布会。
en: Welcome to the launch of our Starlight Night collection.

zh: 这个系列，我花了整整三个月的时间设计。
en: I spent three full months designing this collection.

zh: 曾经有人说，Lolita是小众文化。也有人说，我一个女孩子，不可能把品牌做起来。
en: Some people said Lolita fashion was just a niche hobby. Others said a girl like me could never build a real brand.

zh: 但我想说，只要有梦想，并且愿意为之努力，就没有什么是不可能的。
en: But I want to say this—if you have a dream and you're willing to fight for it, nothing is impossible.

zh: 而且，我不是一个人在战斗。
en: And besides... I'm not fighting alone.

zh: 谢谢你，林辰。
en: Thank you, Lin Chen.

zh: 林辰！我们成功了！
en: Lin Chen! We did it!

zh: 恭喜你，安雅。你做到了。
en: Congratulations, Anya. You really did it.

zh: 我真的做到了……我以为我永远都做不到……
en: I actually did it... I thought I never would...

zh: 安小姐，恭喜恭喜！发布会非常成功！
en: Miss An, congratulations! The launch was a tremendous success!

zh: 我是星辰服饰的总经理。我们非常看好「暗夜蔷薇」的发展前景，想以五百万的价格收购你的品牌。
en: I'm the GM of Starcrest Apparel. We see incredible potential in Nightshade Rose, and we'd like to acquire your brand for five million.

zh: 如果你同意的话，我们会给你提供最好的资源和平台，让你的品牌走向全国。
en: If you agree, we'll give you top-tier resources and a platform to take your brand nationwide.

zh: 五百万？
en: Five million?

zh: 是的。这是我们的合同，你可以先看看。
en: That's right. Here's the contract—take a look.

zh: （看着合同，又看看我，最终把合同合上了）对不起，王总。我不能接受。
en: （Glancing at the contract, then at me, finally closing it）I'm sorry, Mr. Wang. I can't accept.

zh: 你确定吗？
en: Are you sure?

zh: 我确定。这条路再难，也是我自己选的。
en: I'm sure. Hard as this road is, it's the one I chose.

zh: 好吧。以后改变主意了联系我。
en: Alright. If you ever change your mind, give me a call.

zh: 安雅，五百万不是小数目。有了这笔钱，你可以用更好的布料，请更多的设计师。
en: Anya, five million isn't pocket change. With that money, you could afford better fabrics, hire more designers.

zh: 「暗夜蔷薇」是你一手做起来的，被收购不代表放弃——等你有了资源，还能把它做得更大。
en: Nightshade Rose is something you built with your own hands. Being acquired doesn't mean giving up—with more resources, you could take it even further.

zh: 你说得对……可是如果卖了，它就不完全是我的了。
en: You're right... but if I sell it, it won't really be mine anymore.

zh: 谢谢你能支持我的决定。
en: Thanks for backing my decision.

zh: 当然支持你。这是你的品牌。
en: Of course I support you. It's your brand.

zh: 林辰，好久不见。
en: Lin Chen, long time no see.

zh: 是啊，好久不见。你还好吗？
en: Yeah, it's been a while. How've you been?

zh: 还好。品牌小，但能活下去。你呢？
en: Hanging in there. The brand's small, but it's surviving. You?

zh: 老样子。上班，拍照，偶尔接点私单。
en: Same old. Work, photography, the occasional freelance gig.

zh: 林辰，谢谢你。那个夏天，我会一直记得。
en: Lin Chen... thank you. That summer—I'll never forget it.

zh: 我也是。如果以后需要摄影师，随时找我。
en: Me neither. If you ever need a photographer, you know where to find me.

zh: 好。一言为定。
en: Good. It's a deal.

zh: 对不起，王总。我不能接受你的收购。
en: I'm sorry, Mr. Wang. I can't accept your acquisition offer.

zh: 为什么？五百万已经是很高的价格了。
en: Why? Five million is already a very generous offer.

zh: 因为「暗夜蔷薇」是我的孩子。我想亲手把它养大。
en: Because Nightshade Rose is my baby. I want to raise it with my own hands.

zh: 虽然现在很难，但我相信，只要我和林辰一起努力，总有一天会成功的。
en: It's tough right now, but I believe that as long as Lin Chen and I work together, we'll get there someday.

zh: 好吧。既然你已经决定了，我也不勉强。如果以后改变主意了，随时可以联系我。
en: Alright. Since you've made up your mind, I won't push. If you ever change your mind, you know where to reach me.

zh: 你真的想好了吗？五百万不是小数目。
en: Are you really sure about this? Five million is no small amount.

zh: 我想好了。
en: I've made up my mind.

zh: 钱可以慢慢赚，但梦想不能卖。
en: Money can be earned slowly, but dreams aren't for sale.

zh: 而且，有你在我身边，我什么都不怕。
en: Besides... with you by my side, I'm not afraid of anything.

zh: 哇……好多星星啊。
en: Wow... so many stars.

zh: 比我小时候在英国看到的还要亮。
en: Even brighter than the ones I saw in England when I was little.

zh: 我说过，会带你来南山看星星的。
en: I told you I'd bring you up to Nanshan to see the stars.

zh: 嗯。你说过的话，都做到了。
en: Mm-hmm. You kept every promise you made.

zh: 林辰，你还记得我们第一次见面的地方吗？
en: Lin Chen, do you remember where we first met?

zh: 当然记得。漫展场外的那个偏僻角落。
en: Of course. That quiet corner outside the convention center.

zh: 那时候我真的好狼狈。脚扭了，又热又累，还被你偷拍了。
en: I was such a mess back then. Sprained ankle, hot and exhausted, and to top it off—you caught me on camera.

zh: 那时候我就在想，这个女孩真好看，怎么会一个人坐在那种地方。
en: I remember thinking—she's gorgeous, why's she sitting alone in a spot like that?

zh: 那时候我怎么也不会想到，那个偷拍我的男生，会成为我生命中最重要的人。
en: Back then, I never would've guessed that the guy who snuck that photo of me would become the most important person in my life.

zh: 林辰，我爱你。
en: Lin Chen... I love you.

zh: 我也爱你，安雅。
en: I love you too, Anya.

zh: 时间过得真快啊。一转眼，一年就过去了。
en: Time really flies. Just like that, a whole year's gone by.

zh: 是啊。那个夏天，好像就在昨天。
en: Yeah. That summer feels like yesterday.

zh: 你看。
en: Look.

zh: 你还留着这张照片啊。
en: You still kept this photo.

zh: 当然。这是我们故事的开始。
en: Of course. This is where our story began.

zh: 这个夏天结束了。
en: This summer is over.

zh: 是啊。但我们的故事，才刚刚开始。
en: Yeah. But our story... is just beginning.

zh: （沉默了很久，然后抬起头）好。我接受。
en: （After a long silence, looking up）Fine. I accept.

zh: 明智的选择。安小姐，欢迎加入星辰服饰。
en: A wise choice. Miss An, welcome to Starcrest Apparel.

zh: 林辰，我把它卖了。
en: Lin Chen... I sold it.

zh: 卖了也好。你现在是星辰的设计总监了，不用再一个人扛所有事。
en: Maybe that's for the best. You're Starcrest's design director now—you don't have to carry everything alone anymore.

zh: 而且——不管品牌叫什么名字，设计师还是你。
en: Besides—no matter what they call the brand, you're still the designer behind it.

zh: 那你呢？你愿意跟我一起去星辰吗？
en: What about you? Would you come to Starcrest with me?

zh: 我做设计总监，你做摄影总监。我们在一起工作。
en: I'll be design director and you'll be photography director. We'll work together.

zh: 从漫展那天开始，我就没想过去别的地方。
en: Ever since that day at the convention... I've never wanted to be anywhere else.

zh: 林辰，下季度的拍摄方案你看了没有？
en: Lin Chen, have you seen the shoot plan for next quarter?

zh: 看了。不过我觉得咱们还是得去重庆拍一次外景。
en: I have. But I still think we need to go to Chongqing for an outdoor shoot.

zh: 为什么？
en: Why?

zh: 因为那是我们故事开始的地方。
en: Because that's where our story started.

zh: ……你真是，什么时候都忘不了那个夏天。
en: ...Honestly. You never can forget that summer, can you.

zh: 当然忘不了。那个夏天我遇到了你，偷拍了一张照片，然后整个人生都变了。
en: Of course I can't. That summer I met you, snapped a secret photo — and my whole life flipped upside down.

zh: 我的也是。
en: Mine too.

zh: （握着合同，指节发白）好。我接受。
en: (gripping the contract, knuckles white) Fine. I accept.

zh: 好。后续会有专人来对接。
en: Good. Someone will follow up with you on the details.

zh: 林辰，我是不是做了一个很懦弱的选择？
en: Lin Chen... did I make a cowardly choice?

zh: 不。你做了一个很现实的选择。这没有错。
en: No. You made a practical choice. There's nothing wrong with that.

zh: 而且——不管品牌卖不卖，你还是你。
en: Besides — whether the brand sells or not, you're still you.

zh: 好久不见。
en: Long time no see.

zh: 大忙人，终于舍得约我出来了？
en: Well well, Mr. Busybody finally decided to ask me out, huh?

zh: 少来。我很想你。
en: Oh stop. I missed you.

zh: 林辰，虽然品牌卖了，但我们还在。
en: Lin Chen, yeah the brand is gone, but we're still here.

zh: 等这阵忙完，我们一起去南山看星星吧。就我们俩。
en: Once this busy stretch is over, let's go to Nanshan to watch the stars. Just the two of us.

zh: 好。我等你说这句话很久了。
en: Okay. I've been waiting ages for you to say that.

zh: 你说，如果当初我没有接受收购，我们会是什么样？
en: Hey... if I hadn't taken that buyout back then, where do you think we'd be?

zh: 大概会穷一点、累一点。但该在一起的，还是会在一起。
en: Probably poorer, more tired. But the ones meant to be together still end up together.

zh: 嘴这么甜，是不是又偷拍我了？
en: When'd you get so smooth? Did you take another sneaky shot of me?

zh: 我光明正大地拍。
en: I take them out in the open.

zh: 对不起，王总。我还是想再试试自己做。
en: Sorry, Mr. Wang. I still want to try going solo.

zh: 好吧。我尊重你的决定。
en: Alright. I respect your call.

zh: 我还以为你会接受。
en: I thought you would've taken it.

zh: 我也犹豫过。但是一想到要把「暗夜蔷薇」交给别人，我就舍不得。
en: I hesitated too. But the thought of handing 'Dark Night Rose' to someone else... I just couldn't let go.

zh: 不过……我现在还没有信心能把它做好。
en: Though... I still don't have the confidence to make it work.

zh: 等你毕业之后，我们一起努力。
en: After you graduate, we'll make it work together.

zh: 林辰！这里！
en: Lin Chen! Over here!

zh: 怎么了？这么急着找我。
en: What's up? You seemed pretty desperate to find me.

zh: 你看！这是上海漫展的门票。我们的品牌被邀请去参展了！
en: Look! These are tickets to the Shanghai Comic Convention — our brand got an invite!

zh: 真的吗？太好了！
en: Seriously? That's incredible!

zh: 是啊！我们终于可以去上海参展了！
en: Right?! We can finally go to Shanghai for the expo!

zh: 林辰，等这次上海漫展结束，我们就正式在一起吧。
en: Lin Chen... when the Shanghai convention is over, let's make it official.

zh: 嗯。这一年来，你一直陪在我身边，帮我解决了那么多问题。
en: Mm-hmm. This whole year, you've been right here with me, helping me through everything.

zh: 我现在有信心了。我可以做好品牌，也可以做好你的女朋友。
en: I've got confidence now. I can make the brand succeed — and I can be a good girlfriend too.

zh: 好。我等你。
en: Okay. I'll be waiting.

zh: 我走了！等我回来！
en: I'm off! Wait for me!

zh: 一路顺风！我等你回来！
en: Safe travels! I'll be right here when you get back.

zh: 好，我同意收购。
en: Alright. I agree to the acquisition.

zh: 安雅？
en: Anya?

zh: 我累了，林辰。
en: I'm tired, Lin Chen.

zh: 这一年来，我每天都在熬夜，每天都在担心品牌会倒闭。我真的撑不下去了。
en: This past year I've stayed up every single night, terrified the brand would collapse. I really can't do it anymore.

zh: 接受收购，我就不用再这么辛苦了。
en: If I take the buyout, I won't have to struggle like this anymore.

zh: 如果你已经决定了，我支持你。
en: If your mind's made up, I've got your back.

zh: 其实，我挺舍不得山城的。
en: You know... I'm really going to miss this city.

zh: 舍不得这里的火锅，舍不得这里的冰粉，也舍不得……你。
en: I'll miss the hotpot here, I'll miss the ice jelly... and I'll miss you.

zh: 到了上海，要好好照顾自己。
en: Take good care of yourself when you get to Shanghai.

zh: 嗯。你也是。要好好吃饭，别总是熬夜。
en: Mm-hmm. You too. Eat proper meals, and stop staying up so late.

zh: 这个给你。
en: Here. This is for you.

zh: 这是我专门为你设计的。情侣款。
en: I designed this just for you. Matching couple's set.

zh: 本来想等发布会结束后送给你的。现在……就当是离别礼物吧。
en: I was gonna give it to you after the launch event. But now... think of it as a parting gift.

zh: 林辰，对不起。
en: Lin Chen... I'm sorry.

zh: 不用说对不起。我理解你。
en: No need to apologize. I understand.

zh: 我会想你的。
en: I'm gonna miss you.

zh: 如果……如果以后我回来了，你还会等我吗？
en: If... if I come back someday, will you still wait for me?

zh: 会的。我会一直等你。
en: I will. I'll always wait for you.

zh: 再见了，安雅。
en: Goodbye, Anya.

zh: 再见了，那个属于我们的夏天。
en: Goodbye, that summer that was ours.

zh: 原来你就是设计师！难怪气质这么特别，和那些只会穿衣服的完全不一样。
en: So you're the designer! No wonder you've got such a unique vibe — totally unlike those girls who just wear the stuff.

zh: 啊、啊我不是故意的！主要是你长得太好看了，我一时看呆了才拍照的……
en: Ah — ah, I didn't mean to! It's just... you're so stunning I kinda spaced out and took the shot before I knew it...

zh: 你胡说什么呢。
en: What are you even babbling about.

zh: 以后有什么事，都可以告诉我。不用一个人硬撑着。
en: From now on, whatever's bothering you, just tell me. You don't have to tough it out alone.

zh: 这……这是粥？
en: Is this... porridge?

zh: 好吃。
en: It's good.

zh: 不用不用！太麻烦你了！
en: No no, I couldn't! That's way too much trouble!

zh: 这几个月你熬了多少个通宵，为的不就是今天吗？
en: All those all-nighters you pulled the past few months — isn't this the day you were working toward?
